description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named SNL-CI that runs on every pull request with specific paths ignored. The workflow should have no repository content permissions and should cancel any in-progress runs for the same workflow and reference. The workflow should have multiple jobs for different environments, including CUDA 12.2 with C++20, HIP with ROCm 5.6.1 and 6.2.1, Intel 2024.2.1 with OpenMP and SYCL, and HPX with GCC 15.1.1. Each job should check out the kokkos repository, configure and build kokkos with specific CMake flags, and run tests with ctest.
